tags.name: Verification
tags.description: Email and phone number verification APIs

tags.name: Service Categories
tags.description: APIs for managing service categories and subcategories

get.description: Retrieves details of a specific subcategory by ID
Retrieves a single role by its ID

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the role to retrieve

put.description: Updates an existing role by its ID

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the role to update

400.description: Invalid request body or existing role

delete.description: Deletes a role by its ID

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the role to delete

get.description: Retrieves the profile information of the currently authenticated user

put.description: Updates the profile information of the currently authenticated user

400.description: Invalid request body or validation errors

get.description: Retrieves details of a specific top-level category by ID

put.description: Updates an existing top-level service category

delete.description: Deletes a top-level service category (soft delete)

post.description: Creates a new subcategory using parentId in request body

get.description: Retrieves a list of all roles

400.description: Invalid request body or existing role

post.description: Replaces the permissions assigned to an existing role

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the role to update

get.description: Retrieves all service categories in a unified hierarchical or flat structure

post.description: Creates a new top-level service category
Verifies an OTP code using the token received from the send endpoint

400.description: Invalid, expired, or already used OTP

post.description: Sends a verification OTP to the provided email and/or phone number. Returns token(s) to use when verifying.

400.description: Invalid request — at least one of email or phone number is required

post.description: Resets the user's password using the OTP received in email

400.description: Invalid or expired OTP, or invalid new password

post.description: Registers a new user in the system

400.description: Invalid request body or validation errors

post.description: Authenticates a user and returns a JWT token
Initiates a password reset by sending a reset OTP to the user's email

400.description: Invalid request or user not found

get.description: Retrieves a list of all permissions
Retrieves a single permission by its ID

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the permission to retrieve

status.description: Indicates whether the API request was successful or not

message.description: Human-readable message providing more details about the outcome

errors.description: Map of field/property names to arrays of error messages, populated during validation failures

data.description: The payload/data returned by the endpoint, shape depends on the exact endpoint

status_code.description: Internal application-specific status code mapping to business logic outcomes
